issues.description: DSL is incomplete and incorrect. Missing core logic: conditional check for [Monkey.D.Luffy] cost 5, PlayFromHand action, and PowerBoost with duration for opponent's next turn. Current actions only trash and flip without conditions or the boost effect.
FlipLife is present but has no conditional logic tied to card name/cost check. The play and boost should only occur IF the revealed card matches criteria.
Missing PowerBoost action. Text states 'up to 1 of your Leader gains +2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn' — requires duration 'DuringOpponentTurn' (not Permanent or EndOfTurn).

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may trash this Character: Reveal 1 card from the top of your Life cards. If that card is a [Monkey.D.Luffy] with a cost of 5, you may play that card. If you do, up to 1 of your Leader gains +2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.
